auth.passkeyEmailRequired: Enter your email before using a passkey.

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.description: Replace the initial password before entering the dashboard.

profile.description: Account, email, password, and active permissions.
profile.accountEmailDescription: Change the email used to sign in. Your current password is required.
profile.emailConflict: That email is already in use.
profile.emailChangeFailed: The email could not be changed. Verify your password.

audit.description: Audit history for sessions, users, and inventory.

audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by event, user, IP, or message...

audit.empty: There are no events to display.

inventory.imported: Inventory restored from JSON backup ({{devices}} devices, {{ips}} IPs)

users.updated: User updated: {{previousEmail}} to {{email}}; username {{previousUsername}} to {{username}}; role {{previousRole}} to {{role}}; active {{previousActive}} to {{active}}

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Installed version, GitHub releases, and platform-aware updates.
updates.checkFailed: GitHub or the update status could not be checked.
updates.started: The update command was started. AE NetScope may restart.
updates.startFailed: The update could not be started.
updates.channelDescription: AE NetScope uses the {{channel}} channel for this installation.

reasons.truenas: TrueNAS installations must be updated from the TrueNAS Apps interface.
reasons.dockerOnly: Automatic updates are only supported for explicitly configured Docker installs.
reasons.configureDocker: Enable automatic updates and configure the update command for this Docker installation.
reasons.releaseCheckFailed: GitHub releases could not be checked right now.
reasons.unknown: Automatic update details are unavailable for this installation.

releaseHistory.title: Release notes
releaseHistory.description: Load recent changelogs from GitHub only when you need to review them.
releaseHistory.loadFailed: Release notes could not be loaded from GitHub.
releaseHistory.noNotes: This release does not include a changelog.
releaseHistory.truncated: The preview was shortened. Open the release to read the complete notes.

checklist.releaseNotes: Read the release notes before updating.
checklist.jsonBackup: Download a JSON backup from Data.
checklist.postgresBackup: Confirm that a pre-migration PostgreSQL backup exists.
checklist.environment: Keep a copy of the production environment variables.
checklist.health: Verify System status: API, database, and Redis.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.description: Create the initial administrator to protect this installation.
setup.alreadyCompleted: The initial administrator has already been created.
setup.failed: Initial setup could not be completed.
setup.restrictedNotice: This flow is available only when no users exist and requires the installation token when configured.

search.noMatches: There are no matches in the loaded inventory.

pages.topology: Expandable map of subnets, VLANs, IPs, and devices
pages.quality: Passive data quality and relationship checks
pages.health: API, database, and Redis health checks
pages.about: Project, version, authorship, license, and official resources

dashboard.previewDescription: Do not use AE NetScope with sensitive production network data yet. The API, schema, and security controls may change before v1.0.
dashboard.noRecentChanges: There are no recent changes to display.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Operational inventory of hosts, network equipment, and servers.
devices.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, IP, MAC, serial, asset tag...
devices.confirmDelete: Delete device "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.load: The device could not be loaded.
errors.save: The device could not be saved. Check duplicate names or invalid fields.
errors.interface: The interface could not be added. Check duplicates or formatting.
errors.deactivate: The device could not be deactivated.
errors.delete: The device could not be deleted.
errors.create: The device could not be created. Check duplicate or invalid fields.

ipMacs.title: IPs and MACs
ipMacs.description: Operational address, interface, and assignment table.
ipMacs.confirmDelete: Delete IP "{{address}}"? This action cannot be undone.
ipMacs.searchPlaceholder: Search by IP, MAC, device, or subnet...

errors.save: The IP could not be saved. Check duplicates, formatting, or assignment.
errors.delete: The IP could not be deleted.

networks.title: Subnets
networks.description: CIDR ranges, gateways, VLANs, and address occupancy.
networks.confirmDelete: Delete subnet "{{cidr}}"? This action cannot be undone.
networks.searchPlaceholder: Search by CIDR, VLAN, gateway, or location...

errors.save: The subnet could not be saved. Check the CIDR, gateway, VLAN, or duplicates.
errors.delete: The subnet could not be deleted.

vlans.title: VLANs
vlans.description: Logical segments, associated subnets, and capacity by VLAN.
vlans.confirmDelete: Delete VLAN "{{id}} - {{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
vlans.searchPlaceholder: Search by ID, name, or description...

errors.save: The VLAN could not be saved. Check for a duplicate ID or invalid fields.
errors.delete: The VLAN could not be deleted.

services.title: Services
services.description: Ports, protocols, and active services by device.
services.confirmDelete: Delete service "{{name}}" from "{{device}}"? This action cannot be undone.
services.searchPlaceholder: Search by service, port, device, or IP...

errors.save: The service could not be saved. Check the device, port, or fields.
errors.delete: The service could not be deleted.

users.title: Users
users.description: Accounts, roles, temporary lockouts, and password resets.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, username, or role...
users.temporaryPasswordHint: It is shown only once. Store it before leaving this view.
users.noSessions: No sessions have been recorded for this user.
users.createDescription: Create a local account and assign its initial role.
users.createPasswordNotice: A strong temporary password will be generated and shown once.
users.accountActiveDescription: Inactive accounts cannot sign in or use existing sessions.
users.currentAccountProtected: Use another administrator to change the role or status of your own account.
users.lastAdminProtected: The last active administrator cannot be demoted or deactivated.

empty.title: No users match these filters
empty.description: Change the search, role, or account status filter.

users.confirmRoleChange: Change the admin role for "{{email}}" to "{{role}}"? Active sessions will be revoked.
users.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate user "{{email}}"? Their sessions will lose access.
users.confirmResetPassword: Generate a new temporary password for "{{email}}"? Their other sessions will be closed.
users.confirmRevokeSessions: Close all active sessions for "{{email}}"? The current session will be preserved when it belongs to you.
users.confirmRevokeSession: Close this session? The device will need to sign in again.
users.confirmResetMfa: Reset TOTP and all passkeys for "{{email}}"? Their other sessions will be closed.

errors.load: The user list could not be loaded.
errors.create: The user could not be created. Check for a duplicate email or invalid fields.
errors.update: The user could not be updated. Make sure at least one active admin remains.
errors.resetPassword: The password could not be reset.
errors.deactivate: The user could not be deactivated. Make sure at least one active admin remains.
errors.resetMfa: MFA and passkeys could not be reset.
errors.duplicateEmail: Another account already uses that email address.
errors.lastAdmin: At least one active administrator must remain.
errors.currentAccount: Use another administrator to change your own role or account status.
errors.copyPassword: The temporary password could not be copied.

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.description: Access matrix applied by AE NetScope to users, inventory, and audit data.

descriptions.admin: Full control over users, security, audit data, and inventory.
descriptions.operator: Can operate the inventory and review audit data without managing users.

data.title: Data
data.description: Backups, restore, and portable inventory exports.
data.noPermission: You do not have permission to export inventory.
data.fullBackupDescription: Download a portable backup with devices, interfaces, IPs, subnets, VLANs, and services.
data.restoreDescription: Validate the file, preview its contents, and download an automatic backup of current data.
data.csvDescription: Individual downloads for spreadsheets or reports.
data.previewDescription: The current inventory will be replaced. Users, sessions, and secrets are not modified.
data.previewReady: Backup validated. Review the preview before restoring.
data.restored: Backup restored: {{counts}}. An automatic backup of the previous data was downloaded.
data.countsSummary: {{devices}} devices, {{ips}} IPs, {{networks}} subnets, {{vlans}} VLANs, and {{services}} services

errors.validation: The backup failed validation. Review the details before continuing.
errors.invalidJson: The file does not appear to be valid AE NetScope JSON.
errors.preview: The backup preview service is unavailable. Try again without selecting another file.
errors.restore: The validated backup could not be restored.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Passive view of registered subnets, VLANs, devices, and IPs.
topology.noSubnets: There are no subnets to draw yet.

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.description: Physical and technical inventory of equipment, warranties, serial numbers, and locations.
hardware.searchPlaceholder: Search by serial, asset tag, rack, owner, CPU...
hardware.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters or add technical data to devices.

notes.description: Operational notes associated with inventory devices.
notes.searchPlaceholder: Search by device, IP, location, or note...
notes.empty: There are no notes to display.
notes.notePlaceholder: Example: physical access, dependency, relevant configuration, pending maintenance...
notes.saveFailed: The technical note could not be saved.
notes.selectHint: Choose a record from the list to review or edit its technical note.

topbar.aboutDescription: Version, project information, license, and credits.

support.title: Support
support.description: Official channels for help, contact, and project follow-up.
support.primaryContactDescription: General support, usage questions, and project reports.
support.administrationDescription: Administrative, security, and project coordination matters.
support.companyDescription: Official website of the company behind AE NetScope.
support.githubDescription: Public repository, issues, releases, and technical tracking.
support.aboutDescription: Review the installed version, authorship, license, and official resources.

about.title: About AE NetScope
about.description: Open source LAN inventory and network documentation for sysadmins and homelabs.
about.creator: Creator and copyright holder
about.resourcesDescription: Canonical project links and release information.
about.projectDescription: A passive, self-hosted tool for maintaining a reliable view of LAN infrastructure.
about.projectBody: AE NetScope brings devices, IP and MAC records, subnets, VLANs, services, hardware, notes, users, audit history, backups, health, and inventory quality into one interface. It does not perform active network discovery.
about.contactDescription: Visit the project website or open the support channels.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Interface preferences for your AE NetScope account and this browser.
settings.localSavedLanguageFailed: Browser settings were saved, but the account language could not be updated.
settings.defaultViewDescription: This preference is stored locally for future sessions in this browser.
settings.startSidebarCollapsedDescription: Use the compact navigation state when opening AE NetScope.
settings.showSystemStatus: Show system status in the top bar
settings.showSystemStatusDescription: Display health, installed version, and update availability shortcuts.
settings.showGitHubButton: Show GitHub in the top bar
settings.showGitHubButtonDescription: Display the repository shortcut and current star count.
settings.showFooterDescription: Display version, documentation, support, and project links at the bottom.
settings.previewNoticeDescription: Control the preview notice displayed on the dashboard.
settings.timezoneDescription: Used to display dates and times across the interface.
settings.dateFormatDescription: Choose the order used for calendar dates.

security.totpDescription: Add a second factor using a compatible authenticator app.
security.totpActive: TOTP authentication is active on this account.
security.passkeysDescription: Use Windows Hello, Touch ID, a phone, or a FIDO2 security key.

security.passkeyUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.

security.actionFailed: The security action could not be completed.

admin.maintenanceDescription: Temporarily block non-admin API access while maintenance is performed.
admin.blockSearchIndexingDescription: Ask search engines not to index or archive this installation.
admin.searchIndexingHelp: AE NetScope publishes a robots.txt policy and an X-Robots-Tag header. Blocking is recommended for LAN and private deployments.
admin.noUpdates: No in-app update attempts have been recorded.
admin.loadFailed: Administrative settings could not be loaded.
admin.saveFailed: Administrative settings could not be saved.

sections.languageDescription: Account language used across supported interface areas.
sections.navigationDescription: Choose how AE NetScope opens in this browser.
sections.interfaceDescription: Adjust information density, motion, and persistent workspace elements.
sections.dashboardDescription: Control optional information displayed on the dashboard.
sections.regionalDescription: Control how dates and times are displayed.
sections.securityDescription: Manage active sessions and multi-factor authentication.
sections.administrationDescription: Control maintenance and review update attempts.

health.title: System status
health.description: Operational health, dependency latency, installed version, and runtime details.
health.loadError: System status could not be loaded.

checkMessages.databasePending: The database check has not run yet.
checkMessages.redisPending: The Redis check has not run yet.

quality.title: Inventory quality
quality.description: Passive checks for consistency, completeness, and relationships in documented data.
quality.findingsDescription: Open a finding to review the affected inventory record.
quality.relationshipsDescription: Useful links inferred from the current inventory.
quality.noIssuesDescription: The visible records pass the selected checks.
quality.truncated: Only the first 250 findings are shown. Resolve them and run the checks again.
quality.unavailableDescription: The inventory loaded, but its quality report could not be calculated.

issueMessages.device_no_ip: No IP address is linked to this device.
issueMessages.ip_no_network: This IP is not classified in a subnet.
issueMessages.ip_outside_network: This IP does not belong to {{network}}.
issueMessages.ip_no_device: This non-reserved IP is not linked to a device.
issueMessages.network_no_gateway: No gateway is documented for this subnet.
issueMessages.vlan_no_network: This VLAN is not linked to any subnet.

issueMessages.duplicate_name: This name is used by {{count}} devices with different capitalization.
